Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: The woman pours a dark liquid from a bottle into a clear blender cup filled with nuts. Green lime wedges rest on a white cutting board to the left of the blender base. Wooden kitchen cabinets and a stainless steel refrigerator form the background environment. Pink text reading www.Happy2BeMe.com is at the bottom center of the frame.

question: Describe the sequence of introductory visuals and ingredients shown from the start.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a pink title card displays 'How To Make Hummus'; at 6s, a woman stands in a kitchen with lime wedges on a white cutting board; at 10s, she holds a clear glass containing light-colored solid items; at 14s, she holds a small glass container near a bottle of Liquid Aminos.

question: Describe the specific actions and items the woman handles during the demonstration.
canonical_answer: At 6s, the woman stands near a blender base containing light-colored nuts; at 10s, she holds a glass with possible nuts or beans; at 14s, she raises her left hand towards her face; at 16s, chopped nuts are visible inside a small blender cup on the counter.
